title: Align release and branch-protection workflows with platform-ci reusable workflows

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Starting implementation: replace Plexus inline release workflow with platform-ci semantic-release reusable workflow, add ruleset-sync wrapper workflow, and add desired-state main branch protection ruleset with bypass actor.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Implementation completed in Plexus:

- Replaced inline release workflow with call to platform-ci reusable semantic release workflow in .github/workflows/release.yml (python 3.11, semantic_release_requirement, anthusbot secrets, guarded workflow_run conditions).
- Added .github/workflows/ruleset-sync.yml wrapper using platform-ci reusable ruleset sync workflow (check/apply modes, RULESET_ADMIN_TOKEN).
- Added desired-state ruleset file infrastructure/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json with main ref targeting, pull request protection, deletion/non-fast-forward rules, and team bypass actor (id 16575896).

Validation:
- YAML parse check passed for release.yml and ruleset-sync.yml.
- JSON validation passed for main-branch-protection.json.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fixing ruleset drift: fetch live main-branch-protection ruleset and align desired required_status_checks contexts in infrastructure/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Patched infrastructure/github-rulesets/main-branch-protection.json to include required_status_checks rule matching live ruleset contexts: Python Tests (3.11), Python Tests (3.12), Dashboard Unit Tests, Dashboard Storybook Tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Release and branch-protection workflows aligned with platform-ci reusable workflows.
